meaning: n.粉,粉末,火药,尘土vt.搽粉于,撒粉,使成粉末vi.搽粉,变成粉末
examples: The mustard is sold in powder form.
She brushed the powder out of her hair.
Seconds after it consumes a spill, the powder balls up and floats away for easy recovery.
The challenge of transforming the powder into an aerosol cloud was handed to rocket scientist Carlos Schuler.
